ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial item (e.g., Cash & Equivalents) */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol associated with the financial item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the financial item (e.g., Assets, Liabilities, Equity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the financial item */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., USD, shares) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the financial item is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the financial item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the financial item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarterly_financials" (
  "quarterly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarterly financial record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated financial item */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the financial record (e.g., Q4 2020) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial record */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount reported for the financial item */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency code for the amount (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "is_audited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the financial record has been audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial record was last audited */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the financial record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the financial record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the financial record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarterly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterly_financials_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES financial_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., executive, analyst, auditor) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report (e.g., Q2 2021 Financial Summary) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Quarterly, Annual) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Finalized) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial item being audited */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "previous_amount" REAL /* Amount before the change */,
  "new_amount" REAL /* Amount after the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the audit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the audit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES financial_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget forecast record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial item */,
  "forecast_year" INTEGER /* Year for the forecast */,
  "forecast_quarter" TEXT /* Quarter for the forecast (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "forecast_amount" REAL /* Forecast amount for the financial item */,
  "is_actual" INTEGER /* Indicates if the forecast is based on actual data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_forecasts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES financial_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., liquidity ratio) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the metric */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the financial metric (e.g., Liquidity, Leverage) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the metric */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial item being compared */,
  "current_period" REAL /* Amount for the current period */,
  "previous_period" REAL /* Amount for the previous period */,
  "variance" REAL /* Calculated variance between current and previous period amounts */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., Year-over-Year, Quarter-over-Quarter) */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change between current and previous periods */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the comparison */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_comparisons_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES financial_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the report setting (e.g., Formatting, Display) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate record */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., EUR, GBP) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate relative to a base currency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency for the exchange rate (e.g., USD) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the exchange rate is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the exchange rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the exchange rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)
